* dist layout

=pdforder.txt= remains at the root because it is the canonical final page order
used by the processing, validation, PDF, and OCR scripts.

- =crops/reference/= legacy untrimmed crops retained as stable crop-window priors.
  Do not use these as final output pages.
- =crops/refined/= current refined crop milestone. These are the pages to use for
  PDF builds and downstream OCR.
- =metadata/refined/= metrics and per-page JSON sidecars from the refined crop
  run.
- =metadata/ocr-bakeoff/= notes comparing local OCR engines, documenting the
  YomiToku full-book OCR run, and recording the later successful Surya-via-
  Podman sample and full-book comparison.
- =pdf/nethack-guide-surya-searchable-uncompressed.pdf= current recommended
  lossless/uncompressed-style searchable PDF generated from the refined crops
  with a Surya text layer. It embeds the 300 DPI page images without JPEG
  quantization.
- =pdf/nethack-guide-surya-searchable-compressed.pdf= smaller searchable PDF with
  the same Surya text layer and a JPEG-compressed image layer.
- =pdf/nethack-guide-yomitoku-searchable-uncompressed.pdf= earlier
  lossless/uncompressed-style searchable PDF generated from the refined crops
  with a YomiToku text layer.
- =pdf/nethack-guide-yomitoku-searchable-compressed.pdf= earlier smaller
  searchable PDF with the same YomiToku text layer and a JPEG-compressed image
  layer.
- =text/surya/= current recommended Surya OCR outputs from the full-book
  Podman/vLLM run: combined Markdown/text, =pdftotext= QA extractions from the
  searchable PDFs, per-page Markdown/text, and page map.
- =text/yomitoku/= current YomiToku OCR outputs: combined Markdown/text,
  =pdftotext= QA extractions from the searchable PDFs, per-page Markdown, and
  page map.
- =text/translation-local/qwen2_5_7b_instruct/= local full-book Japanese-to-
  English machine translation generated from Surya OCR using
  =Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct= served by vLLM. Includes raw JSONL records,
  combined Markdown/text, per-page files, block-level translation records,
  validation logs, and =pdftotext= QA extractions from translated PDFs.
- =metadata/translation-bakeoff/= local translation model/sample comparisons.
- =metadata/translation-pdf-prototype/= translated facsimile prototype metadata,
  Oracle reconstruction recommendations, preview images, and fit summaries.
- =metadata/translation-block-hybrid/= block-level translated hybrid PDF source
  manifest, generation writeup, cleaned-background summary, fit reports,
  validation notes, and previews.
- =metadata/translation-review-pdf/= side-by-side original/translation review
  PDF metadata and previews.
- =pdf/nethack-guide-qwen2_5_7b-block-hybrid.pdf= current block-level translated
  hybrid PDF: original/refined page imagery with derived cleaned backgrounds,
  final English block translations keyed to Surya block IDs, and fit-report
  validation.
- =pdf/nethack-guide-qwen2_5_7b-translated-prototype.pdf= older page-level
  translated facsimile prototype: original scan background with Surya text
  boxes whitened and page-level English translation flowed through those boxes.
  Kept for comparison; not recommended as the primary facsimile artifact.
- =pdf/nethack-guide-qwen2_5_7b-translation-review.pdf= side-by-side review PDF
  with original page image on the left and local English translation on the
  right. This is the preferred human-evaluation artifact for translation
  quality.
- =text/ocr-jpn/= legacy per-page Japanese OCR text from the older flat layout.
- =text/translation-deepl-pages/= legacy per-page DeepL translation text.
- =text/translation-google-pages/= legacy per-page Google translation text.
- =text/full_eng*.txt= full-book legacy translation outputs.
- =scripts/= old one-off shell helpers retained for provenance; prefer the
  top-level =scripts/= OpenCV pipeline for new processing.

Raw scans are stored outside =dist= under =scan/= and are never overwritten by the
processing pipeline.
